title: Salter EK5832BMA Marble 2-Slice Toaster – Wide Slots, Extra Thick Bread, 7 Browning Levels, Removable Crumb Tray, Unique Marble Effect*, Defrost, Reheat, Cancel, Self-Centring, 900W, Black
features: 2 SLICE TOASTER: Start the day in style with our Marble 2-Slice toaster, making perfect toast every time, with a stylish marble effect finish to complete any kitchen.
WIDE SLOTS: From bagels to crumpets and teacakes – the toaster has wide slots perfect for all types of thick bread.
7 BROWNING LEVELS: Perfect for the whole family, our toaster has 7 variable browning levels to adjust to everyone’s liking from lightly to well toasted.
DEFROST, REHEAT, CANCEL: Forget to defrost a loaf? No problem, this toaster has defrost, reheat and cancel functions for added convenience.

MATCHING SET: Add a touch of the latest trends to your home and coordinate your kitchen with our contemporary marble collection. Every Salter Marble kettle and toaster will have a unique and different marble pattern due to how it is produced.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page 1 7 Browning Levels 2 Defrost, Reheat & Cancel 3 Wide Slots 4 Removable Crumb Tray

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎2-Slice Capacity, Wide Slots, Removable Crumb Tray, Marble Design, Breakfast/Snack, Toast, Crumpets, Teacakes, Bagels, Defrost/Cancel/Reheat Functions, 900W
